creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Cannot start service blocky with rc.conf blocky_user="myuser".

cmd line:

user: `blocky -c ~/blocky-config.yml:`
---
(...)
[2023-01-30 08:23:16]  INFO server: Starting server
[2023-01-30 08:23:16]  INFO server: http server is up and running on addr/port 4000
[2023-01-30 08:23:16] ERROR server start failed: start udp listener failed: listen udp :53: bind: permission denied
---

superuser: `doas blocky -c ~/blocky-config.yml`:
---
[2023-01-30 08:24:56]  INFO server: Starting server
[2023-01-30 08:24:56]  INFO server: http server is up and running on addr/port 4000
[2023-01-30 08:24:56]  INFO server: TCP server is up and running on address :53
[2023-01-30 08:24:56]  INFO server: UDP server is up and running on address :53
---

Am I'm missing something?
